zh.lifeSummary: James Wilford是Robert Wilford of Oxton和Joan的兒子，於大約1455年出生在英國。他於大約1488年與Elizabeth Bettenham在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1499年被列為sheriff of london。他去世於1526年4月27日之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 巴沙洛繆 馮 雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): habitational name from either of two places called Wilford, in Nottinghamshire and Suffolk, both probably named with an Old English wilig ‘willow tree’ + Old English ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Wilfert
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wolf ‘wolf’ + hart ‘hardy, brave’, ‘strong’.
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements willio ‘will, wish’ + fridu ‘peace’.

variants.name: Willford
meanings: English (East Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Rutland, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Wilford  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: James Wilford was born about 1455, in England as the son of Robert Wilford of Oxton and Joan. He married Elizabeth Bettenham about 1488, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. In 1499, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as sheriff of london. He died after 27 April 1526, in his hometown, and was buried in London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: James Wilford est né environ 1455, à Angleterre, fils de Robert Wilford of Oxton et Joan. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bettenham environ 1488, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. En 1499, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of london. Il est décédé après 27 avril 1526, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlese: London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, England

Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1499, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of london aufgeführt. Er starb nach 27. April 1526 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: James Wilfordは約1455年にイギリスでRobert Wilford of OxtonとJoanの息子として生まれた。約1488年にイギリスでElizabeth Bettenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1499年，45歳の時，職業はsheriff of londonと記録されている。彼は1526年4月27日以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト バーソロメウ ス レスにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlese: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 레스
ko.lifeSummary: James Wilford(은)는 대략 1455년 영국에서 Robert Wilford of Oxton(와)과 Joan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1488년 영국에서 Elizabeth Bettenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1499년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of london이었다. 그는 1526년 4월 27일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 레스에 묻혔다.

pt.London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlese: London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: James Wilford nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Inglaterra filho de Robert Wilford of Oxton e Joan. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bettenham aproximadamente 1488, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1499, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of london. Ele faleceu após 27 de abril de 1526, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Bartholomew the Less, Middlese: лондон ст бартоломю т лесс, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: James Wilford родился около 1455 г. в местности Англия. Его родителей звали Robert Wilford of Oxton и Joan. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bettenham около 1488 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1499 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of london. Он умер после 27 апрель 1526 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности лондон ст бартоломю т лесс, миддлесекс, Англия.
